title: Boot Agent OS in QEMU AArch64
summary: Reach deterministic structured early console, boot-info parsing, memory discovery, and controlled halt on the primary emulated architecture.

title: Boot Agent OS in QEMU x86-64
summary: Prove architecture separation with a second ISA and the same kernel object/service semantics.

title: Implement initial system image and bootstrap service graph
summary: Assemble kernel, initial process, service manager, essential services, target board package, trust material, and recovery metadata reproducibly.

title: Build deterministic service trace replay harnesses
summary: Build deterministic service trace replay harnesses

title: Create QEMU hardware profiles and CI target matrix
summary: Model CPU/memory/interrupt/storage/network/display/input/device-fault variants so kernel/platform/product tests do not rely on one emulated configuration.

title: Reach native early boot on PinePhone Pro
summary: Boot SMP to structured console on phone-form hardware with exact revision, reversible flashing, power safety and documented recovery.

title: Map Pixel boot, memory, interrupt, timer, IOMMU, and storage architecture
summary: Produce an approved functional specification and native board-package plan for essential SoC/board primitives after early diagnostics.

title: Evaluate Pixel modem, radio, secure element, and verified-boot boundaries
summary: Identify lawful native control, firmware, provisioning, key, attestation, cellular and certification dependencies without attempting unsafe or unsupported claims.

title: Specify measured boot and attestation semantics
summary: Define what is measured, who can attest, privacy/linkability, freshness, claims, key custody, verifier policy and unsupported hardware behavior.

title: Implement anti-rollback and security-version policy
summary: Prevent unauthorized downgrade of boot, update, schema, keys and security-critical services while preserving explicit recovery and development paths.
